name: Hyatt House Franchising, L.L.C.

current_snapshot.territory_headline: Area of Protection with AOP Term

territory_reality.headline: Area of Protection with AOP Term

validation_questions: Confirm Item 19 cohort size and definition with franchisor.
Confirm current auditor and most recent audit opinion.

internal_unresolveds.reason: AOP Term is 'typically' 3 years but is negotiable per-deal. Actual protection period unknown until FA is signed.
Guarantor Monetary Threshold is determined per-deal based on Hotel size, market, and risk. No standardized minimums disclosed in FDD.
Renewal terms 'may be materially different' — specific changes to fees, territory, and other terms unknowable from FDD alone.
Goodwill impairment of $110M in management/franchising segment reporting unit. Fair value fell below $1,116M carrying value. Specific business drivers for the shortfall not fully explained.
Franchisor entity financials are unaudited ($50.5M total assets). True financial backing depends on parent's absolute and unconditional guarantee.
